title: 勝ちたくて、勝ちたいから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a bad dream about losing in the Japanese
Derby, Winning Ticket begins to panic and push
herself too hard during training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I confront her about this, she confesses
that she's scared of running in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We talk more, and I realize that she wants to win
more than anyone. So I declare that her powerful
feelings are her greatest strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by those words and armed with
determination, Winning Ticket yells into the night
sky that she will win the Japanese Derby.
